title: Money Principles I Know Today But Wish I Knew in My 20s
description: From being homeless on the streets of Mumbai to reaching the boardrooms of billion dollar companies, Sandeep shares 11 essential financial rules that shaped his journey. These principles blend smart investing, disciplined money management, and a long-term mindset.
